channel.title: Exit Watch — Ethereum validator queue surges
channel.description: Statistical surge detection on the Ethereum validator entry and exit queues, cross-checked across two independent sources.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2026-06-27: +171K ETH (z=6.7)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +170,695 ETH on 2026-06-27, 6.7 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 2,977,812 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2026-06-20: +345K ETH (z=6.6)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +345,248 ETH on 2026-06-20, 6.6 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 383,348 ETH. Probable: Lido. Attribution: probable.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2026-05-27: +222K ETH (z=4.8)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +222,131 ETH on 2026-05-27, 4.8 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 222,195 ETH. Probable: Kraken. Attribution: probable.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2026-04-24: +375K ETH (z=3.5)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +375,441 ETH between 2026-04-24 and 2026-04-25, 3.5 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 3,060,262 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2026-04-10: +197K ETH (z=6.7)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +196,760 ETH on 2026-04-10, 6.7 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 196,760 ETH. Probable: Lido. Attribution: probable.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2026-03-31: +193K ETH (z=7.4)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +193,108 ETH on 2026-03-31, 7.4 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 2,966,115 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2026-02-26: +96K ETH (z=3.8)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +96,395 ETH on 2026-02-26, 3.8 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 135,179 ETH. Probable: Lido. Attribution: probable.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2026-01-30: +404K ETH (z=3.1)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +403,958 ETH on 2026-01-30, 3.1 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 4,072,327 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2026-01-06: +689K ETH (z=4.2)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +688,531 ETH between 2026-01-06 and 2026-01-09, 4.2 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 1,776,102 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2025-12-28: +222K ETH (z=8.8)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +221,560 ETH on 2025-12-28, 8.8 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 690,968 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-11-26: +76K ETH (z=3.2)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +75,902 ETH on 2025-11-26, 3.2 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 1,718,363 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-10-26: +291K ETH (z=3.1)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +290,817 ETH on 2025-10-26, 3.1 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 2,458,219 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2025-10-08: +1.20M ETH (z=13.6)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +1,195,533 ETH between 2025-10-08 and 2025-10-09, 13.6 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 1,377,477 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-09-10: +2.03M ETH (z=16.9)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +2,033,134 ETH between 2025-09-10 and 2025-09-11, 16.9 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 2,650,032 ETH. Probable: Kiln. Attribution: probable.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2025-08-25: +475K ETH (z=5.1)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +474,508 ETH between 2025-08-25 and 2025-08-26, 5.1 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 627,133 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2025-08-15: +219K ETH (z=8.3)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +218,924 ETH on 2025-08-15, 8.3 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 324,542 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-07-19: +382K ETH (z=9)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +382,460 ETH between 2025-07-19 and 2025-07-22, 9 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 475,708 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Entry queue surge 2025-06-03: +164K ETH (z=6.4)
item.description: Ethereum validator entry queue absorbed +163,510 ETH on 2025-06-03, 6.4 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 281,492 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-05-22: +86K ETH (z=17.1)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +85,822 ETH on 2025-05-22, 17.1 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 88,898 ETH. Attribution: unattributed.

item.title: Exit queue surge 2025-04-14: +112K ETH (z=4)
item.description: Ethereum validator exit queue absorbed +111,584 ETH on 2025-04-14, 4 standard deviations above the trailing 30-day baseline. Queue reached 111,712 ETH. Probable: Kraken. Attribution: probable.
